$schema_note: Third-party binary blobs for the Radxa Zero 3E, pinned per GoSD's no-rehosting policy: fetched from upstream at build time by URL + sha256, never re-hosted in our releases.

rkbin.license_note: Rockchip's rkbin LICENSE (at the pinned commit, repo root) grants a non-exclusive license to use, copy, and distribute the software, and to modify/sublicense modifications. This permits idbloader.img and u-boot.itb -- which necessarily embed these blobs -- to be produced and distributed by GoSD.

ddr_tpl.purpose: DDR-init TPL (ROCKCHIP_TPL): rk3566 has no open-source DRAM init, so it uses the rk3568 DDR blob per U-Boot's doc/board/rockchip.rst (rk3566 shares the rk3568 boot chain).

bl31.purpose: ARM Trusted Firmware BL31 (EL3 runtime firmware). rk3566 has no open TF-A port; it reuses the rk3568 BL31 binary, as documented in U-Boot's doc/board/rockchip.rst.
